The Shadow Mind Projection Test

A Freudian Projection Personality Assessment

What is a projection test?

Projection tests are personality assessments designed to uncover unconscious thoughts, emotions, and conflicts by analyzing how people respond to ambiguous situations. Sigmund Freud believed that hidden desires, anxieties, and defense mechanisms influence behavior without people fully realizing it.

This original test presents a symbolic story. Your choices will be interpreted using Freudian personality concepts such as the id, ego, anxiety, repression, and defense mechanisms.
